reviews_data.review_text: Good coffee andnice staff
Chai tasted like water :( and the place is very small, it is inside a bookstore.
Great spot to get coffee and play chess, its also a book store so it generates a peaceful environment
Been here are few times and I usuly get the butterbrew but today I got the wingleader in a small and it was delicious! Highly recommend 👌

Located inside Books-a-million.
Lots of seating available. Sit and talk or read a book while enjoying the cozy inside of the book store!
Tasty and unique beverages- I love their selection drinks based on things from books- so creative!
They also have many tasty and unique treat options you can purchase at the coffee shop as well.
Love getting a coffee with my books, wish they had a drive thru!
Good coffee and service.

I felt like having a mocha on Monday after seeing my dentist ( a treat for myself! ) not the place I usually go to was closed so Google gave me this as an option. The last time I came here was when I moved to this area SIX years ago!!!
I got a mocha frappe and it was so amazing I had a total of FOUR in a week!!!!
I'm never going to waste my money on a watery Starbucks mocha frappe again! Trust me you won't either if you try this one!!!
I also tried the frappe that shalt not be named and that was pretty awesome too!!

I used to work at a coffee shop and when someone orders regular coffee, iced or hot, the cashier gets it right away so the barista can focus on the espresso drinks. That didnt happen here. The woman who took our order for 2 black iced coffees left the cups for the barista and started doing dishes(?!). Meanwhile the barista made 5-6 specialty drinks before she finally got to ours to which she poured hot/warm coffee over ice so when we got our order the coffees were room temperature. Waited 15 mins for warm coffee. Never again.
Good coffee
Enjoy a nice cup of joe every once in a while.  The 2 guys working the counter where really helpful. It's nice to ask about a product and get a good explanation with a sample.

They have the best chocolate caramel lattes ever they had a new person there working the counter they really wouldn't knowledgeable on how to make a chocolate caramel latte but it was still good nonetheless even if it wasn't done properly lol

Just came back today after a couple of weeks and it's improved a bunch the chocolate caramel latte is awesome the new person behind the bar is great
Great coffee! Was not expecting the coffee shop to be in Books A million, but gave us something to read while coffees were made. Highly recommend!
Best coffee in town. The vanilla creme frappe is awesome!!!
They know us and know what we want. We don't really have to order. We go there all the time.They are very sweet and friendly.
The frozen smore chocolate is very good
Americano was great service was fabulous
Never enough of some items. They go faster than i can get there! Pruces are reasonable
1st time goin here, tried a mocha caramel latte,  and I'm hooked
Joe's muggs. They must be nice. To have a mugg store.. I'd pay thrice the price. I need no mugg.. I need no cup.. Don't even know where it is.. But if I find it I'll stop and say. What's sup.
A great place to have coffee and people watch.
Excellent flavor  coffee
Got a caramel frappe from there and it was very good! Excellent service!
Typical coffee shop, usually pretty empty, so able to get my coffee fairly quickly
I dont buy nothing here for myself. Just not into what they sell but my kids love their lattes or frappa or whatever you call them. Place looks clean and employees are nice.
Love the coffee. It is the best hands down way better than Starbucks!
